idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'home improvement loan' signals consumer stress lifting XLY
behavior: Rising interest in home improvement loans often signals increased consumer willingness to spend on discretionary housing-related retail items.

market_impact.rationale: Increased loan interest suggests consumer confidence in discretionary home-related spending.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search volume for 'home improvement loan' rises by more than 15% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if search volume declines for 2 consecutive weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Google Trends weekly data frequently shows >15% spikes in consumer loan interest seasonally and with credit cycles.

idea: Daily spike in freight logistics RSS news volume mentioning 'port labor strike' triggers bearish XLI
behavior: Labor disruptions at ports typically cause immediate shipment delays and supply chain bottlenecks affecting industrial goods.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector suffers from logistics interruptions caused by labor disputes.

trade_logic.entry: If daily RSS counts for 'port labor strike' exceed 3x average daily baseline
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when RSS count returns below 1.5x baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor disputes and strike news spikes are common and generate quick media surges impacting logistics.

idea: Weekly rise in Google Trends searches for 'gas price protest' signals bearish XLE
behavior: Increasing consumer interest in gas price protests often indicates rising fuel costs and consumer dissatisfaction, pressuring energy demand.

market_impact.rationale: Energy sector faces demand headwinds when consumer resistance to fuel prices escalates.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search volume for 'gas price protest' rises 20% above 4-week moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when search interest drops below 10% over moving average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Periodic fuel price increases drive protest interest and Google Trends spikes multiple times yearly.

idea: Weekly surge in job postings for warehouse workers signals bullish XLI
behavior: Growing demand for warehouse labor indicates rising industrial activity and goods movement.

market_impact.rationale: Increased warehouse hiring presages stronger industrial output and logistics activity.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly job postings for 'warehouse worker' exceed 1.5x 8-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if postings drop below 1.1x average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Warehouse labor demand fluctuates seasonally and with supply chain demands, triggering multiple weekly surges.

idea: Daily spike in daily earthquake activity near major logistics hubs signals bearish XLI
behavior: Sudden increases in seismic activity near logistics hubs can disrupt supply chains and industrial operations.

market_impact.rationale: Increased earthquake activity threatens industrial infrastructure causing operational uncertainty.

trade_logic.entry: If daily earthquake event count near major hubs rises 2x above 30-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when daily count returns below 1.2x average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seismic clusters near hubs occasionally spike, causing temporary operational concerns.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'DIY electronics repair' signals bullish XLK
behavior: Rising interest in DIY electronics repair suggests consumers delaying new purchases but engaging with tech products.

market_impact.rationale: Increased tech engagement even via repairs supports technology sector resilience.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest for 'DIY electronics repair' rises 25% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or decline below 10% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: DIY repair interest spikes seasonally and with consumer budget shifts.

idea: Daily spike in RSS news counts around 'labor union contract negotiation' signals bearish XLF
behavior: Heightened news flow about union contract talks often precedes labor disruptions affecting financial sector clients.

market_impact.rationale: Financial institutions face risk from client operational disruptions and wage inflation.

trade_logic.entry: If daily RSS count for 'labor union contract negotiation' exceeds 3x 20-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when RSS count drops below 1.5x average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Union negotiation news regularly spikes as contracts approach expiration dates.

idea: Weekly rise in Google Trends interest for 'food delivery delay' signals bearish XLP
behavior: Increasing consumer searches for food delivery delays indicate stress in consumer convenience and food retail logistics.

market_impact.rationale: Food and staples retail sector suffers when delivery issues reduce sales and consumer satisfaction.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search volume for 'food delivery delay' rises 20% above 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or decline below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Food delivery disruptions are common during seasonal demand surges or labor shortages.

idea: Weekly spike in Google Trends for 'home cooling failure' signals bearish XLU
behavior: Surges in searches about home cooling failures indicate stress on utilities and potential power supply issues.

market_impact.rationale: Electric utilities face operational pressure and potential outages when cooling systems fail broadly.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search volume for 'home cooling failure' rises 30% above 8-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when volume drops below 10% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Cooling system issues spike in summer months and heat waves causing utility strain.

idea: Daily spike in RSS counts for 'cybersecurity breach' news triggers bearish XLK
behavior: Increased cyber breach news often causes technology sector volatility and short-term selling pressure.

market_impact.rationale: Cybersecurity events increase risk perception and can hit tech stock prices temporarily.

trade_logic.entry: If daily RSS count for 'cybersecurity breach' exceeds 4x 20-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or RSS count below 2x average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Cyber incidents cluster often with multiple daily news spikes.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'commuting strike' signals bearish XLY
behavior: Rising interest in commuting strikes indicates potential disruption to travel and consumer discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Travel and discretionary sectors suffer when commuting disruptions reduce customer foot traffic.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search volume for 'commuting strike' rises 20% above 6-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if volume drops below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Commuting strikes happen periodically and generate quick interest spikes.

idea: Weekly spike in Google Trends searches for 'warehouse automation failure' signals bearish XLI
behavior: Increased interest in warehouse automation failures signals potential operational risks in logistics.

market_impact.rationale: Logistics companies face disruptions and cost overruns when automation systems fail.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search volume for 'warehouse automation failure' rises 30% above 8-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Automation system issues spike occasionally due to new tech rollouts or glitches.

idea: Daily spike in RSS news counts mentioning 'politician insider buying tech stock' signals bullish XLK
behavior: Surges in news about political insiders buying tech shares often precede short-term bullish tech rallies.

market_impact.rationale: Insider buying by politicians is perceived as confidence in the tech sector's outlook.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when RSS count drops below 1.5x average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Political insider activity news spikes cluster around earnings and legislative sessions.

behavior: Growing consumer and business concern about bulk shipping delays suggests supply chain issues impacting materials.

market_impact.rationale: Material sector experiences headwinds from shipping delays increasing costs and slowing production.

behavior: Rising searches for water outages reflect infrastructure stress that can hurt real estate demand and value.

market_impact.rationale: Real estate sector is vulnerable to local utility disruptions reducing property appeal and livability.
